data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality through API reads or persisted state checks. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence, it is clear that there is a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that an email copy is auto-sent to the signatory.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
